name: archival_memory_add
description: This tool belongs to the memory suite, which provides APIs to manage both short-term and long-term memory data. Short-term memory is limited in size and can be accessed quickly, while long-term memory is larger but takes longer to access. Both type of memory is persistent across multiple conversations with the user, and can be accessed in a later interactions. You should actively manage the memory data to ensure that it is up-to-date and easy to retrieve later. Tool description: Add a key-value pair to the long-term memory. Make sure to use meaningful keys for easy retrieval later.

key.description: The key under which the value is stored. The key should be unique and case-sensitive. Keys must be snake_case and cannot contain spaces.

value.description: The value to store in the long-term memory.

name: archival_memory_clear
description: This tool belongs to the memory suite, which provides APIs to manage both short-term and long-term memory data. Short-term memory is limited in size and can be accessed quickly, while long-term memory is larger but takes longer to access. Both type of memory is persistent across multiple conversations with the user, and can be accessed in a later interactions. You should actively manage the memory data to ensure that it is up-to-date and easy to retrieve later. Tool description: Clear all key-value pairs from the long-term memory, including those from previous interactions. This operation is irreversible.

name: archival_memory_key_search
description: This tool belongs to the memory suite, which provides APIs to manage both short-term and long-term memory data. Short-term memory is limited in size and can be accessed quickly, while long-term memory is larger but takes longer to access. Both type of memory is persistent across multiple conversations with the user, and can be accessed in a later interactions. You should actively manage the memory data to ensure that it is up-to-date and easy to retrieve later. Tool description: Search for key names in the long-term memory that are similar to the query using BM25+ algorithm.

query.description: The query text to search for.

k.description: The number of results to return.

ranked_results.description: A list of tuples containing the BM25+ score and the key.

name: archival_memory_list_keys
description: This tool belongs to the memory suite, which provides APIs to manage both short-term and long-term memory data. Short-term memory is limited in size and can be accessed quickly, while long-term memory is larger but takes longer to access. Both type of memory is persistent across multiple conversations with the user, and can be accessed in a later interactions. You should actively manage the memory data to ensure that it is up-to-date and easy to retrieve later. Tool description: List all keys currently in the long-term memory.

keys.description: A list of all keys in the long-term memory.

name: archival_memory_remove
description: This tool belongs to the memory suite, which provides APIs to manage both short-term and long-term memory data. Short-term memory is limited in size and can be accessed quickly, while long-term memory is larger but takes longer to access. Both type of memory is persistent across multiple conversations with the user, and can be accessed in a later interactions. You should actively manage the memory data to ensure that it is up-to-date and easy to retrieve later. Tool description: Remove a key-value pair from the long-term memory.

key.description: The key to remove from the long-term memory. Case-sensitive.

name: archival_memory_replace
description: This tool belongs to the memory suite, which provides APIs to manage both short-term and long-term memory data. Short-term memory is limited in size and can be accessed quickly, while long-term memory is larger but takes longer to access. Both type of memory is persistent across multiple conversations with the user, and can be accessed in a later interactions. You should actively manage the memory data to ensure that it is up-to-date and easy to retrieve later. Tool description: Replace a key-value pair in the long-term memory with a new value.

key.description: The key to replace in the long-term memory. Case-sensitive.

value.description: The new value associated with the key.

name: archival_memory_retrieve
description: This tool belongs to the memory suite, which provides APIs to manage both short-term and long-term memory data. Short-term memory is limited in size and can be accessed quickly, while long-term memory is larger but takes longer to access. Both type of memory is persistent across multiple conversations with the user, and can be accessed in a later interactions. You should actively manage the memory data to ensure that it is up-to-date and easy to retrieve later. Tool description: Retrieve the value associated with a key from the long-term memory. This function does not support partial key matching or similarity search.

key.description: The key to retrieve. Case-sensitive. The key must match exactly with the key stored in the memory.

value.description: The value associated with the key.
